title: stelis calculosa
intro: Stelis calculosa, a species of orchid, is a flowering plant known for its unique characteristics and medicinal properties. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in tropical regions, due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Stelis calculosa include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving immune function, making it a potential treatment for various ailments. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion by brewing the dried flowers and leaves in hot water, or sometimes used in combination with other herbs in herbal preparations.
